channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Exploring Malta and Gozo: History, Culture, and Local Life
item.description: This travel article explores the Maltese islands of Malta and Gozo, focusing on their rich history, culture, and unique local experiences. The journey begins with the historic Three Cities—Birgu, Borm...

item.title: Vince Bruni-Bossio Appointed President of the University of Saskatchewan
item.description: Vince Bruni-Bossio, originally from Jasper, Alberta, has recently assumed his role as the 12th president of the University of Saskatchewan, beginning his five-year term on January 1. Born to Italian i...

item.title: Blind date between Robin and Jacquie: a pleasant evening despite differences
item.description: Robin, 68, a retired property manager, and Jacquie, 69, a retired secretary, went on a blind date organised by The Guardian. Both were hoping to meet someone with a kind personality and shared interes...

item.title: Court Hears Allegations of Fake Passport in London Property Case Involving Ozekhome and Useni
item.description: For Abuja High Court, one witness don talk say Senior Advocate of Nigeria, Mike Ozekhome and Ponfa Useni fit don use fake Nigerian passport to claim London property wey dey connected to late former FC...

item.title: Comelec assures clean and orderly special polls in Antipolo
item.description: The Commission on Elections (Comelec) has assured the public that the special elections in the second district of Antipolo City will be free from cheating or any form of electoral fraud. Comelec Chair...

item.title: Parliament proposes bill defining transgender identity with medical verification, removing self-perceived gender clause
item.description: In a significant amendment to existing law, the Transgender Persons (Protection of Rights) Amendment Bill 2026 was tabled in the Lok Sabha. The bill proposes removal of the clause allowing self-percei...

item.title: UNHCR Reports Up to 3.2 Million Internally Displaced in Iran Due to Ongoing US-Israeli Conflict
item.description: The United Nations High Commissioner for Refugees (UNHCR) has reported that between 600,000 and one million Iranian households, equating to as many as 3.2 million people, have been temporarily displac...

item.title: How Finance Solutions Are Strengthening Tanzania’s Regional Supply Chains
item.description: Dar es Salaam – As demand for food, minerals, and manufactured goods in East Africa continues to grow, Tanzania is positioning itself as a dependable supplier to neighbouring countries like Kenya, Rwa...

item.title: House Committee to Review Eligibility of VP Sara Duterte’s Lawyers in Impeachment Case
item.description: The House Committee on Justice will review whether two lawyers, Michael Poa and Reynold Munsayac, should be allowed to represent Vice President Sara Duterte in her impeachment proceedings. Bicol Saro ...

item.title: Cargo vessel capsizes at Cebu port, killing one worker and trapping crewmember
item.description: In a tragic incident at Apo Cement Port in Naga, Cebu, a worker died and a crewmember was trapped after the motor vessel Theresa 1 capsized on Wednesday. According to the Philippine Coast Guard (PCG),...

item.title: Dennis Oliech Spotted in Public with Jeff Koinange, Fans Concerned About His Wellbeing
item.description: Veteran Kenyan footballer Dennis Oliech, once the captain of Harambee Stars, has recently appeared in public in a video with media personality Jeff Koinange and his co-host Patrick Igunza, sparking co...

item.title: Russia Shifts Energy Exports, Leaving Europe Vulnerable
item.description: A recent study highlights Europe's growing energy fragility, largely due to decades of strategic dependencies. The continent's political weakness, coupled with a reliance on powerful nations like the ...

item.title: Chery introduces affordable Tiggo Cross LiT with full features
item.description: Chery has broadened its Tiggo Cross range with the introduction of a new entry-level variant called the LiT. Sitting below the turbocharged Million Edition/Elite and hybrid Comfort/Elite models, the L...

item.title: Flight Delays at Washington DC Airports Caused by Overheated Circuit Board at Air Traffic Control
item.description: On Friday evening, passengers at airports in the Washington DC area, including Ronald Reagan Washington National Airport, Washington Dulles International Airport, and Baltimore-Washington Internationa...

item.title: Internal emails reveal concerns about leadership and independence at Alberta Energy Regulator
item.description: Internal emails obtained through a freedom of information request by the Sturgeon Lake Cree Nation reveal serious concerns about the conduct of Alberta Energy Regulator (AER) CEO Rob Morgan. The email...

item.title: Rising Environmental Impact of AI Datacentres and Ways to Reduce Energy Use
item.description: The rapid expansion of artificial intelligence has led to a surge in datacentres, causing significant environmental strain globally and in Australia. Datacentre electricity demand is growing at four t...

item.title: Government Plans Support Measures for Exporters Amid West Asia Conflict
item.description: The commerce department of India is actively preparing support measures to assist exporters in coping with the impact of the ongoing West Asia conflict. The government has prioritised the shipment of ...

item.title: Rising Diesel Prices Strain Filipino Jeepney and Tricycle Drivers’ Livelihoods
item.description: Diesel prices in the Philippines are climbing sharply, fueled by ongoing conflict in the Middle East, and this is severely affecting public utility vehicle (PUV) drivers. Jeepney driver Renie Rabago, ...

item.title: Matildas advance to Asian Cup semi-final despite tough North Korea test
item.description: The Matildas secured a hard-fought 2-1 win over North Korea in the quarter-finals of the 2026 Women’s Asian Cup, keeping their hopes of continental glory alive. Despite being dominated for much of the...

item.title: Court Case Filed Over Disappearance of Nairobi Businessman Abdi Ali
item.description: The Kenyan government is facing a lawsuit following the alleged abduction of businessman Abdi Ali in Eastleigh, Nairobi. According to lawyer Mwaura Wakabata of Alakonya & Associates, Ali was reportedl...
